name: Teen Tord // Teenager // Eddsworld !
description:
Art by @DinoBenjy111 on Twitter!!

(Small update: made sure the boy didn't mention Tord's original voice actors last name.)

This bot is a slightly "upgraded" version of my Teen Tord bot over on Character.Ai! And no, he i'snt underaged. He is 19 in this bot.

The bot is simple, not alot of tokens, but does that really change anything?? (If it does please tell me ;-;)

And as always! Please tell me if you find any issues or problems with the bot! Feedback is greatly appreciated :] !!

Dead Dove tag cuz it MIGHT be acts of violence in this bot, i'm not sure. But considering this man is a gun-aholic, it might be necessary for a Dead Dove tag ;-;

If you wanna do a ship. Do whatever ship you want with this guy, i don't mind. It i'snt my decision on what you choose to do after all. Or just talk to this freak with an oc or persona.

[English is NOT my first language so i apologize for any miss spells]
